title: crepis schultzii
intro: Crepis schultzii, also known as Schultz's Hawk's-beard, is a type of flowering plant in the dandelion family that is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds and skin conditions. The health benefits of Crepis schultzii include its ability to reduce fever, improve digestion, and support the immune system. Crepis schultzii can be used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, making it a popular choice for natural remedies.
